label: DC1
evidence: The atlas (Gopee et al., 2024) includes DC1 as a fine-grained immune cell annotation in prenatal skin (Supplementary Table 3). Extended Data Fig. 1f shows DC1 co-locating with pre-dermal condensate cells in Visium spatial transcriptomics. The peer review confirms DC1 corresponds to conventional dendritic cells (cDC1). Botting & Haniffa (2020) confirm DC1 is present in first-trimester human skin and closely resembles its adult counterpart. Suo et al. (2022) confirm DC subsets are transcriptionally conserved between prenatal and adult.
